title: [DISCONTINUED] Homebaked Origin Furs Pack
description: A resource pack for the Origin Furs that adds a few missing Origins.
body:
A little side project between me and [@infinite_bugz](https://www.instagram.com/infinite_bugz/) on Instagram.

The current plan is to add these Origins:
- Wolf
- Fox
- ~~Snow Golem~~ (Added)
- Evoker
- Bee
- ~~Drowned~~ (Added)
- Guardian
